svg.text: AI-Powered Multi-Asset Institutional Vault on Rayls
PRIVATE — All ops go through VaultPolicy.sol
Their assets — available for DvP swaps
PUBLIC — Investors see attestations + issued tokens, NEVER vault contents
Investors see: NAV, asset-by-asset allocation, yield history, certifications, quorum votes
Never see: private addresses, counterparties, strategy parameters
Agent A (risk) | Agent B (yield) | Agent C (compliance) | Agent D (balanced)
Each runs independently via Claude Code CLI — quorum required
IStrategy interface — institutions deploy their own strategy module
Roadmap: zkProof verification — cryptographic proof attestation matches vault state
Institutions CANNOT modify this module — investors trust it
Protocol, not a product — any institution deploys a vault
One vault. Any asset class. 4-agent quorum. On-chain governance. Protocol-owned attestation.
